content.full_text:
0 13 0 1

State of California

Memorandum

To : File                                                Date  March 6, 1978

                                                         /11-78-337

From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
       Ted Prim

Subject: Disposition of Appeals


      At the January 1978, meeting, the Commission directed the
Conflicts of Interest Committee to hear all appeals from
designated employees prior to bringing such appeals to the
full Commission. This procedure will enable the Committee
to crystallize the major issues and build a record. The hope
is that the hearing before the full Commission would be more
efficient.


TP:mfa

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an internal memorandum, not an advice letter responding to a legal question. No question or conclusion sections present. Document outlines procedural directive regarding appeal handling.
